```mjs title=main.mjs
import { createRequire as __rspack_createRequire } from "node:module";
const __rspack_createRequire_require = __rspack_createRequire(import.meta.url);
// fs
const external_fs_namespaceObject = __rspack_createRequire_require("fs");
// ./namespace.js




// ./named.js


// ./index.js



it("should keep node-commonjs namespace and named external imports aligned", () => {
	expect(external_fs_namespaceObject.readFile).toBe(external_fs_namespaceObject.readFile);
	expect(external_fs_namespaceObject.readFileSync).toBe(external_fs_namespaceObject.readFileSync);
});


```
